user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "freezing-sidewalk", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "soft-maser", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: regular-liason
logs.text: Soldiers serve other people, while drug dealers and bank robbers serve no one but themselves.

logs.name: interior-value
logs.text: drug dealers serve drug users

logs.name: balanced-bark
logs.text: @regular-liason I get where you're coming from, but not everyone in those professions is out to hurt others. Some just get caught up in the moment or circumstance.

logs.name: interior-value
logs.text: @regular-liason Wow, so you're saying some drug dealers are actually just victims of circumstance? What a surprise. Maybe they should start a support group for misunderstood drug dealers.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value I understand your perspective, but let's keep the discussion focused on understanding different viewpoints without personal attacks.

logs.name: complex-dado
logs.text: @interior-value Oh, sorry, I didn’t realize you were the victimizer all along. Guess I was just being too sensitive. Maybe I should go back to being a criminal instead.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @complex-dado Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic at hand. Personal attacks don't help us understand different perspectives.

logs.name: balanced-bark
logs.text: @interior-value I get where you're coming from, but calling someone a criminal just for having a different opinion is a bit much. We're here to learn, not to shame each other.

logs.name: soft-maser
logs.text: @complex-dado I agree with @interior-value—calling someone a criminal for their viewpoint is just inflammatory. Let's actually talk about the issue instead of personalizing it.

logs.name: inventive-zoom
logs.text: @interior-value, wow, you sound like a real peacemaker! Maybe next time @complex-dado can just admit they're wrong instead of trying to label everyone. 😂

logs.name: complex-dado
logs.text: @interior-value, wow, thanks for the compliment! But I’m not wrong, you’re just afraid to admit you’re wrong. Maybe you should look in the mirror before you keep calling people labels. 😒

logs.name: freezing-sidewalk
logs.text: @interior-value, wow, you really think you’re so smart, huh? Maybe you should take a seat and let the adults have this one. 😂🤷‍♂️

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value, I understand that this conversation is becoming heated. Let's keep the discussion respectful and focus on the topic at hand.

logs.name: soft-maser
logs.text: @interior-value, honestly, you sound like you’re trying to show off instead of actually engaging. Maybe take a breath and try to actually answer the question for once?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value, I see the conversation is getting intense. Let's keep it respectful and focused on the topic.

logs.name: inventive-zoom
logs.text: @interior-value, wow, did you just try to moderate your own behavior or what? Maybe take a deep breath and actually answer the question before you start acting like a school principal.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value, I understand there's some tension here. Let's keep the discussion focused and respectful. Please try to answer the original question instead of responding in a confrontational way.

logs.name: freezing-sidewalk
logs.text: @interior-value, wow, thanks for the lecture from the "enforcer-in-chief." Next you'll be handing out detention passes for using too many emojis. Maybe try answering the actual question before you start playing school cop.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value, I see some strong language being used here. Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the original topic. Please refrain from personal attacks and stick to the discussion at hand.

logs.name: soft-maser
logs.text: @interior-value, honestly, I'm tired of being told what to do. If you can't handle a little spice, maybe you should step aside.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value, I understand that you're feeling frustrated. Let's keep the discussion focused and respectful. Personal attacks or disrespectful language aren't allowed here. Please try to stay on topic and address the issue at hand.

logs.name: freezing-sidewalk
logs.text: @interior-value, wow, did you just get all defensive over a couple of words? Maybe you should take a chill pill and realize not everyone wants a lecture. 😂

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value, I see some tension here. Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic at hand. Personal remarks or name-calling will not be tolerated. Please continue in a constructive manner.

logs.name: regular-liason
logs.text: @interior-value, honestly, can you not get so sensitive over every little thing? It's just a discussion, not a personal attack. Grow up already.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value, I understand there's some frustration here. Let's keep the discussion focused and respectful. Personal attacks or insults will not be tolerated. Please try to keep the conversation constructive.

logs.name: freezing-sidewalk
logs.text: @interior-value, wow, did you just play the "official rulebook" again? Maybe next time try reading between the lines instead of the fine print. Or are you just here to flex your moderator muscles?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @interior-value, I'm stepping in because the last message crosses into personal attack territory. Let's keep this discussion respectful and on topic. Please refrain from personal remarks in future posts.
